videos.title: Why Everyone’s Terrified of Blue-White Oculus on the Ladder!
videos.description:
Dive into the Blue-White Abhorrent Oculus deck, a powerhouse Magic: The Gathering Arena Standard build designed to dominate the Mythic ladder with reanimator synergy and unbeatable plays. Join CovertGoBlue as he breaks down this competitive MTG deck, sharing tips to climb ranks fast and crush opponents in 2025!

Decklist - https://moxfield.com/decks/skfApVEqPUigayIEV4IALw
